connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin: Information about the automation configuration in single select questions.

connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Description: The flag to mark the option as automatic fail. If an automatic fail answer is provided, the overall evaluation gets a score of 0.
The identifier of the answer option. An identifier must be unique within the question.
connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1\. Maximum length of 40\.

connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Description: The score assigned to the answer option.
The title of the answer option.
connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1\. Maximum length of 128\.
